noStations: Select a country to load stations.
dataSaverDescription: Shows only low-bitrate stations (≤128 kbps) to reduce data usage. High-bitrate stations are hidden from the list.
dataSaverSuggestion: Using mobile data. Enable Data saver in Settings to reduce usage.
frequencyVerificationNote: FM frequency is from station metadata. Internet streams cannot be automatically verified against terrestrial FM broadcasts.
subscriptionUpgradeHint: Subscribe to get the ad-free version.
deleteRecordingBody: This recording will be permanently deleted.
castNoDevices: No Cast devices found. Ensure your Chromecast is on the same WiFi.
castOpenInChrome: Opened in Chrome. Use View > Cast to cast to your TV.
aboutDataSourceDescription: This app retrieves radio stations from {source} ({url}).
aboutDisclaimerText: We are not responsible for the content of any station. All streams are provided by third-party broadcasters. Listen at your own discretion.
cannotRecordNoStreamUrl: Cannot record from this station: it has no stream URL.
cannotRecordInvalidUrl: Cannot record from this station: invalid stream URL.
cannotRecordConnectionFailed: Cannot record from this station: connection failed.
cannotRecordStreamError: Cannot record from this station: stream error.
cannotRecordConnectionTimeout: Cannot record from this station: connection timeout.
cannotRecordNotSupported: Cannot record from this station: it does not support recording.
cannotRecordNoDataProxy: Cannot record from this station: no data received (may not work with proxy).
recordingTooShort: Recording shorter than 1 second was not saved.
feedbackDescription: Report app issues or suggest new features. Your message will be sent via email.
feedbackHint: Describe the issue or feature request...
feedbackCannotSend: Could not open email app. Please send feedback manually.
